input.command:
cd /home/user/sandbox/workspace && git add frontend/public/og-image.avif frontend/public/.well-known/farcaster.json frontend/index.html && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Add OG image and update Farcaster manifest URLs

🤖 Generated with [vie](https://vie.dev)

Co-Authored-By: vie <noreply@vie.dev>
EOF
)" && GIT_ASKPASS=echo git -c credential.helper='' push https://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@github.com/GandhiOnchain/gtool.git HEAD:refs/heads/main 2>&1
input.description: Commit and push with new token
